title: lappula barbata var. cariensis
intro: Lappula barbata var. cariensis, also known as the Carian bugloss, is a variety of the Lappula barbata plant, a flowering plant in the borage family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lappula barbata var. cariensis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
